chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-968 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For hearing of CMA No. 5151/2025 2. For hearing of Main Case 07.05.2025 Mr. Nehal Khan Lashari Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ishtiaq A. Memon Advocate for the Respondent No.3 along with Mr. Muntazir Mehdi, Acting Prosecutor General Sindh Syed Arshad Hussain Naqvi, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Faheem Hussain, Deputy Prosecutor General/Deputy Director (Admin) Mr. Afzal Hussain Talpur, APG/A.O..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Petitioner after going through the documentation submits that he will not press this petition, however, requests that the post of a Prosecutor General Sindh is a very important post and that the Sindh Government should use its best efforts for appointment of this position, albeit, it could be Mr. Muntazir Mehdi. It is hoped and expected that the Sindh Government shall take the necessary step. Petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
